title: Russian-Style Roasted Quinoa Bowl
description: A hearty, flavorful bowl filled with roasted vegetables, quinoa, and a tangy Russian-inspired dressing.
instructions: Toss the diced red pepper with olive oil, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet and roast for 20-25 minutes.
Cook the quinoa according to package instructions.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked quinoa, roasted red pepper, and thawed corn.
In a small bowl, whisk together the fragrant rice vinegar and chopped fresh dill.
Pour the dressing over the quinoa mixture and toss to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the quinoa bowl hot, garnished with additional fresh dill if desired.
